titleStmt.title: SII 38.513: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 513. (A.R. No. 513 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the west base, yāga-maṇḍapa, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Parakēśarivarman alias Rājādhirājadēva I, who destroyed the ships at Kāndaḷūr-sālai. Year 28: 1046 A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete and built in. The title ‘Parakēsarivarman’ is obviously a mistake for Rājādhirāja I who bore the title Rājakēsarivarmaṉ. This inscription records the sale of lands, belonging to Kauśikan Kaṇḍaṉ Ambalattāḍi, Kaṇḍaṉ Tirunīlakaṇṭaṉ, Nīlakaṇṭaṉ Aiyāṟaṉ, and Kodaṇḍaṉ Pāṇḍaṉ, which had been in arrears (of land tax) for a long time, (as they migrated to other country), to the god of Tiruvūṟattūr, for 16 kaḻañju of gold.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṭiyaṉ ka cālaiyuṅ kalam paracekaripanmarāṉa śrīirājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 Ā
tūr nāṭṭu tiruvūṟṟattūr mūla tiruvūṟṟattūr perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Eṅ rāmaṇi kocikaṉ kaṇṭaṉ Ampalattāṭi nilamum kaṇṭaṉ tirunilakaṇṭaṉ nilamum nilakaṇṭa(ṇṭa)ṉ AiThe letter ai is written ḍayyāṟaṉ nilamum kotaṇṭan pāṇṭaṉ nilamum neṭuṅkālam IṟaiyirutuRead iṟaiyiṟātupokavum Antatecam percatāvavumRead perttākavumIvarkaḷ nilam kuḷamuṅ kuḷakkaḻaniyum Ilmaṉai toṭṭam puṟaṇiyum vilaikku viṟṟu koṇṭa poṉ patiṉaṟu kaḻañ ppon koṇṭu
Digital edition of SII 38.513 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
